attempts.strategy: Verbatim probe-confirmed body from PROGRESS.md — single combined Edit appending both iter-057 declarations between iter-056's basicOpenCover_inter_isAffineOpen (ending L1473) and end CoverTotality. Body uses classical opener + Finset.cons_induction; empty case impossible by t.Nonempty (closed via Finset.not_nonempty_empty); cons case splits via t.eq_empty_or_nonempty: empty residual closed via simp [basicOpenCover]; non-empty residual decomposes via Finset.inf'_cons hne, Finset.prod_cons, applies the IH ih hne, then change C.left.basicOpen (a.1 : Γ(C.left, U)) ⊓ _ = _ followed by rw [← Scheme.basicOpen_mul] to consolidate.
attempts.code_tried: theorem basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_eq_basicOpen_prod {k : Type u} [Field k] {C : Over (Spec (.of k))} {U : TopologicalSpace.Opens C.left.toTopCat} (s : Set Γ(C.left, U)) (t : Finset s) (h : t.Nonempty) : t.inf' h (basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) s) = C.left.basicOpen (∏ i ∈ t, (i.1 : Γ(C.left, U))) := by classical; induction t using Finset.cons_induction with | empty => exact absurd h Finset.not_nonempty_empty | cons a t ha ih => rcases t.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne; · simp [basicOpenCover]; · rw [Finset.inf'_cons hne, Finset.prod_cons, ih hne]; change C.left.basicOpen (a.1 : Γ(C.left, U)) ⊓ _ = _; rw [← Scheme.basicOpen_mul]
attempts.goal_before: t.inf' h (basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) s) = C.left.basicOpen (∏ i ∈ t, (i.1 : Γ(C.left, U)))
attempts.insight: The change tactic step normalises basicOpenCover s a (which Lean displays as (fun f ↦ C.left.basicOpen ↑f) a) to the canonical C.left.basicOpen a.1 form so the subsequent rw [← Scheme.basicOpen_mul] can apply. Finset.cons_induction is the canonical n-ary Finset-with-non-empty inductive shape (vs Finset.induction_on which lacks the cleaner cons-form decomposition for inf').

next_steps: Iter-058+ Čech-evaluation arguments at arbitrary degree n will use this lemma to identify the (n+1)-fold intersection of basic-open cover members with the basic open of the finite product. Combined with Mathlib's IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen, each Čech cochain factor lands as Localization.Away (∏ i, (x i).1) of Γ(C.left, U).

attempts.strategy: Verbatim probe-confirmed body from PROGRESS.md — same combined Edit as Target 1. attempts.code_tried: theorem basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_isAffineOpen {k : Type u} [Field k] {C : Over (Spec (.of k))} {U : TopologicalSpace.Opens C.left.toTopCat} (hU : IsAffineOpen U) (s : Set Γ(C.left, U)) (t : Finset s) (h : t.Nonempty) : IsAffineOpen (t.inf' h (basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) s)) := basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_eq_basicOpen_prod s t h ▸ hU.basicOpen _
attempts.insight: Term-mode ▸ rather than tactic-mode rw is mandatory because the implicit Subtype.val coercions on elements of Finset s cause motive-occurrence issues for the rewriter (Did not find an occurrence of the pattern). Plan-agent flagged this as a known dead end in PROGRESS.md. The ▸-rewrite resolves these directly via Eq.mpr without invoking the rewriter's pattern-matching.

next_steps: Iter-058+ Koszul acyclicity step uses this lemma as the affine-membership inductive step: each finite intersection of basic opens of an affine open is itself affine, which is required to apply IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen at every degree of the Čech complex.
